requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (AZS/CISPR 14 series under AZSTAND)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（AZSTAND制度下的AZS/CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（AZSTAND制度下的AZS/CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Azerbaijani market are subject to electromagnetic compatibility requirements administered under the AZSTAND (State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control) standardization and conformity regime. Azerbaijan operates a national conformity regime and is NOT an EAEU member, so the EAEU EMC technical regulation （TR CU 020/2011）and the EAC mark do not by themselves confer Azerbaijani conformity. Azerbaijan adopts AZS standards that mirror international IEC/CISPR documents — for household appliances the relevant emission basis is the CISPR 14-1 family （emission limits and measurement methods for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus）and CISPR 14-2 （immunity）. Conformity is demonstrated through AZSTAND-recognised conformity assessment, with test evidence referencing the adopted AZS/IEC/CISPR standards. The national radio regulator may have additional requirements for any appliance incorporating wireless connectivity.
summary.zh: 投放阿塞拜疆市场的家用制冷器具须符合在AZSTAND（反垄断与消费市场监管国家局）标准化与合格评定制度下管理的电磁兼容要求。阿塞拜疆实行国家合格评定制度，且非EAEU成员国，因此EAEU电磁兼容技术法规（TR CU 020/2011）及EAC标志本身不构成阿塞拜疆合格评定。阿塞拜疆采用对应国际IEC/CISPR文件的AZS标准——家用器具方面，相关发射依据为CISPR 14-1系列（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射限值和测量方法）及CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。合格评定通过AZSTAND认可的合格评定程序证明，检测证据须引用所采用的AZS/IEC/CISPR标准。对任何含无线连接功能的器具，国家无线电监管机构可能另有要求。
summary.zht: 投放亞塞拜然市場的家用製冷器具須符合在AZSTAND（反壟斷與消費市場監管國家局）標準化與合格評定制度下管理的電磁相容要求。亞塞拜然實行國家合格評定制度，且非EAEU成員國，因此EAEU電磁相容技術法規（TR CU 020/2011）及EAC標誌本身不構成亞塞拜然合格評定。亞塞拜然採用對應國際IEC/CISPR文件的AZS標準——家用器具方面，相關發射依據為CISPR 14-1系列（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射限值和測量方法）及CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。合格評定通過AZSTAND認可的合格評定程序證明，檢測證據須引用所採用的AZS/IEC/CISPR標準。對任何含無線連接功能的器具，國家無線電監管機構可能另有要求。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND (State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control) — national standardization and conformity assessment authority for regulated products
AZS adoption of CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
AZS adoption of CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard
AZS adoption of IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3 — harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuation / flicker (where applicable)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China and Azerbaijan derive their household-appliance EMC requirements from the same CISPR 14 family, the underlying technical content is closely aligned, but Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test reports are not automatically accepted as Azerbaijani conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国与阿塞拜疆的家用器具电磁兼容要求均源自同一CISPR 14系列，底层技术内容高度一致，但中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测报告不被自动接受为阿塞拜疆合格评定证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國與亞塞拜然的家用器具電磁相容要求均源自同一CISPR 14系列，底層技術內容高度一致，但中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測報告不被自動接受為亞塞拜然合格評定證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions （IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020）

gap.en: Because both regimes are based on the CISPR 14 family, the technical content gap is generally small. The remaining gaps are procedural: (1) Conformity route — Azerbaijani market placement requires demonstration of conformity under the AZSTAND regime referencing adopted AZS/IEC/CISPR standards; a Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC report is not automatically valid and may need to be re-presented, supplemented, or re-issued through an AZSTAND-recognised conformity assessment path. (2) Regime distinction — exporters must not assume that an EAEU EAC EMC certificate suffices; Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member and maintains its own national conformity regime. (3) Wireless models — refrigerators with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth connectivity may fall under the national radio regulator in addition to general EMC requirements. Manufacturers should confirm the exact AZS standard editions and the accepted test-report provenance with an in-country importer or conformity body before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均基于CISPR 14系列，技术内容差距通常较小。剩余差距为程序性：（1）合格评定路径——阿塞拜疆市场投放须在AZSTAND制度下、引用所采用的AZS/IEC/CISPR标准证明合格评定；中国GB 4343.1 CCC报告不自动有效，可能须通过AZSTAND认可的合格评定路径重新提交、补充或重新签发。（2）制度区分——出口商不得假定EAEU EAC电磁兼容证书足够；阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国，维持自身国家合格评定制度。（3）无线型号——带Wi-Fi或蓝牙连接功能的电冰箱除一般电磁兼容要求外，可能受国家无线电监管机构管辖。制造商在出货前应与在地进口商或合格评定机构确认确切的AZS标准版本及可接受的检测报告来源。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均基於CISPR 14系列，技術內容差距通常較小。剩餘差距為程序性：（1）合格評定路徑——亞塞拜然市場投放須在AZSTAND制度下、引用所採用的AZS/IEC/CISPR標準證明合格評定；中國GB 4343.1 CCC報告不自動有效，可能須通過AZSTAND認可的合格評定路徑重新提交、補充或重新簽發。（2）制度區分——出口商不得假定EAEU EAC電磁相容證書足夠；亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國，維持自身國家合格評定制度。（3）無線型號——帶Wi-Fi或藍牙連接功能的電冰箱除一般電磁相容要求外，可能受國家無線電監管機構管轄。製造商在出貨前應與在地進口商或合格評定機構確認確切的AZS標準版本及可接受的檢測報告來源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — EMC conformity demonstrated under the AZSTAND regime referencing adopted AZS/CISPR 14 standards; EAEU EAC EMC certification does not by itself confer Azerbaijani conformity (national regime)
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity for household refrigerators in Azerbaijan is demonstrated under the AZSTAND regime against adopted AZS/CISPR 14 standards. Because China's GB 4343.1 and Azerbaijan's AZS standards share the same CISPR 14 lineage, the technical gap is small, but Chinese CCC EMC test data is not automatically accepted — conformity should be confirmed through an AZSTAND-recognised path. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member, so EAC EMC certificates do not substitute. Wireless-enabled models may additionally engage the national radio regulator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆家用电冰箱的电磁兼容合格评定在AZSTAND制度下、依据所采用的AZS/CISPR 14标准证明。由于中国GB 4343.1与阿塞拜疆AZS标准同属CISPR 14谱系，技术差距较小，但中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据不被自动接受——合格评定应通过AZSTAND认可的路径确认。阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国，故EAC电磁兼容证书不能替代。带无线功能的型号可能另涉国家无线电监管机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然家用電冰箱的電磁相容合格評定在AZSTAND制度下、依據所採用的AZS/CISPR 14標準證明。由於中國GB 4343.1與亞塞拜然AZS標準同屬CISPR 14譜系，技術差距較小，但中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據不被自動接受——合格評定應通過AZSTAND認可的路徑確認。亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國，故EAC電磁相容證書不能替代。帶無線功能的型號可能另涉國家無線電監管機構。
